name: iTutorGroup Automated Hiring Screening
description: Production use of automated hiring-screening software in iTutorGroup recruiting workflows, including EEOC age-discrimination enforcement and settlement.

deployment_context.deployment_setting: production applicant screening and auto-rejection workflows
known_risks: weak human override in screening pipelines

sources.title: iTutorGroup to Pay $365,000 to Settle EEOC Discriminatory Hiring Suit - Original Complaint
sources.excerpt: More than 200 qualified applicants age 55 and older were denied employment because of age.

sources.title: iTutorGroup to Pay $365,000 to Settle EEOC Discriminatory Hiring Suit - Settlement
sources.excerpt: The software automatically rejected female applicants 55+ and male applicants 60+.

sources.title: Joint Notice of Settlement and Consent Decree - EEOC v. iTutorGroup, Inc.
sources.publisher: U.S. District Court, Eastern District of New York

transparency_explainability.claim: Applicants were screened by software logic that produced opaque rejection outcomes, with limited applicant-facing explanation.

fairness_nondiscrimination.claim: Federal enforcement established age-based disparate treatment allegations tied to deployed screening automation.

safety_robustness.claim: Enforcement-driven remediation indicates controls existed but were insufficient to prevent harmful production behavior.

privacy_data_governance.claim: Automated handling of applicant attributes for screening creates governance risk around lawful and appropriate data use.

human_agency_oversight.claim: Auto-rejection behavior indicates weak human intervention checkpoints before adverse hiring outcomes were issued.

accountability.claim: Public enforcement action and court-tracked settlement provide explicit legal accountability pathways.

assumptions: Scores synthesize deployed workflow evidence and enforcement records into the MEDF Likert scale.
This case study evaluates governance properties of real hiring automation use, not proprietary model internals.
The evidence set is curated for reproducible pre-deployment governance comparison.
